text: What's one small brave thing you did today?
When you're nervous, what helps you feel a little braver?
What's something you used to be scared of that doesn't scare you anymore?
When was the last time you said yes to something that scared you a little?
If you could try one new thing this week with zero chance of failing, what would it be?
What's one tiny thing today that made you feel lucky?
Who made you smile today, and what did they do?
What's a thing in our house you'd really miss if it disappeared tomorrow?
When was the last time someone surprised you with kindness?
What's one ordinary thing you'd be sad to live without?
If our family had a theme song, what would it be and why?
What's the silliest thing that happened this week?
If you could swap places with any animal for one day, which one and what would you do?
What's the most ridiculous outfit you'd wear if there were no rules?
If we had to give the kids a brand-new family rule, what's the funniest one you can think of?
Who needs a little extra kindness right now? What's one thing we could do?
What's something nice someone did for you today that you didn't get to thank them for?
If you could send a secret kind message to someone, who would you send it to?
When was the last time being kind cost you something — and was it worth it?
Who in our life have we been forgetting to call?
What's a question you've been wondering about lately?
If you could learn anything tomorrow with no effort, what would you pick?
What's something you saw today that you wanted to know more about?
What's a topic you used to find boring that you're starting to like?
If you could spend one day inside any book or movie, which one?
What's a story about Mom or Dad as a kid that you want to hear again?
What's something you remember from when you were exactly the age the kids are now?
What family tradition do you love most? Which one should we start fresh?
Who's someone in our family you wish you knew better?
What's a thing your parents used to say that you catch yourself saying now?
If you could be amazing at one thing by next year, what would you pick?
What's one place in the world you really want to go someday?
If you ran the world for a day, what would you change first?
What's something you wanted as a kid that you actually have now?
What would you do tomorrow if you knew you couldn't fail?
When did you feel most like yourself this week?
What's something you wish I knew about your week?
What's one thing about our family right now that you'd want to remember in ten years?
What's something I do that helps you feel loved?
What's a quiet thing about us that's working really well lately?
What's one thing that was hard today, and what helped?
When you make a mistake, what's the first thing you usually do?
What's something you're working on that's harder than it looks from the outside?
What's a thing you used to find hard that's gotten easier?
Who in our family is really good at handling hard things — and what do they do that we could borrow?
What's the weirdest thing you've thought about today?
What's something tiny you noticed today that most people would miss?
If trees could talk, what do you think the oldest one near our house would say?
What's one belief you have now that your younger self would be surprised by?
What do you think we'll be doing five years from tonight?
